steps.label: Simulate Kill Switch — emergency_disabled=true in sample config
steps.notes: Config validation confirmed emergency_disabled detection. In production: set emergency_disabled=true in config — takes effect immediately on next eligibility check.

steps.label: Eligibility engine confirms would_send_live_now=false after kill switch
steps.notes: All 75 eligibility scenarios returned would_send_live_now=false. Kill switch verified effective.

steps.label: Incident log template created
steps.notes: Incident log template available in docs/AUTONOMOUS_INCIDENT_RESPONSE_RUNBOOK.md. Simulated entry created in drill.

steps.label: Root cause analysis process understood
steps.notes: RCA process: (1) check audit trail for affected case, (2) identify which gate should have blocked, (3) find why it failed, (4) test fix offline.

steps.label: Fix verification via acceptance harness understood
steps.notes: After fix: re-run SL-PHASE-5E-autonomous-readiness-acceptance-harness.ps1 -RunAll. Must pass 45/45 before re-enabling.

steps.label: Re-enable criteria understood
steps.notes: Re-enable only after: root cause documented, fix applied and tested, acceptance harness 45/45, owner sign-off.

simulated_incident_log.what_happened: SIMULATION: Autonomous send went to wrong recipient (hypothetical)
simulated_incident_log.next_steps: Identify gate failure, fix eligibility engine, re-run acceptance harness, get owner sign-off
